text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family attached one-and-a-half story traditional designed zero lot line. It conforms to most other existing zero lot lines in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Empire St, to the South by Oakland Ave, to the East by Towanda Barnes, and to the West by Hershey Rd.
